createGmackoApp.notes: V1 should migrate the OMNIDAT web/operator surface into a create-gmacko-app scaffold. The current Python service remains a behavior harness until the generated app owns these flows.

fryosSharedInfra.notes: OMNIDAT can share local app routing and operational readiness conventions with FryOS while keeping packet, activity, and queue state local to OMNIDAT.

realtime.notes: Radio PAD and queue updates are request/response for V1. FryOS-style realtime can be added after the service contracts settle.

database.notes: V1 uses the FryOS local Postgres service/database with an OMNIDAT schema. SQLite remains only a prototype/export harness until the create-gmacko-app app owns persistence.

payments.notes: Carrier accounting stays cosmetic until a Shadybucks/Shadybank integration is explicitly approved.
